channel.title: Auth on Morgoth
channel.description: Recent content in Auth on Morgoth

item.title: Auth
item.description:
auth.py

自定义authentication backend.

from django.contrib.auth.backends import BaseBackend
class MyBackend(BaseBackend):
def authenticate(self, request):
...
def get_user(self, user_id):
...

配置使用自定义backend

AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS = ("apps.ldap_auth.auth.MyBackend",)

https://github.com/etianen/django-python3-ldap

auth

配置

INSTALLED_APPS = (
'django.contrib.auth'，
'django.contrib.contenttypes'
)

‘django.contrib.auth’ 包含了验证框架的内核和它的默认模型。

‘django.contrib.contenttypes’ 是 Django content type system ，允许你创建的模型和权限相关联。

MIDDLEWARE_CLASSES = (
'django.contrib.sessions.middleware.SessionMiddleware',
'django.contrib.auth.middleware.AuthenticationMiddleware',
)

用户登录:

from django.contrib.auth import authenticate, login
user = authenticate(username='name', password='pw')
login(request, user)

登陆时的默认验证后端:

AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS = ['django.contrib.auth.backends.ModelBackend']

用户登出:

from django.contrib.auth import logout
logout(request)
